# Yohaku Companion v1.7.9

## Fixes and reliability

- Fixed missing QQ Music playback links for radio and recommendation tracks that have not yet been written to the local queue or song database.
- Added a final fallback that reads QQ Music's local AutoMix song MID cache and resolves those exact candidates through one batched song-detail request.
- Kept link publication fail-closed by requiring an exact title match and compatible artist, album, and duration metadata; ambiguous or unavailable results remain unlinked.

## Privacy and efficiency

- The fallback sends only QQ Music-generated song MID candidates back to QQ Music. It does not send the captured title, artist, album, local paths, credentials, or pairing data.
- Local queue and database resolution remain first priority. Positive and negative outcomes are cached briefly to avoid repeated requests, and no additional environment variable is required.
